hero.summary: Recent Software Engineering graduate passionate about data analysis and generating insights that drive business decision-making.

about: Recent Software Engineering graduate from UANL, passionate about data analysis and generating insights that drive business decision-making. Experience in Business Intelligence, data visualization, web development, and STEM education, combining technical skills with strategic understanding. Focus on transforming data into actionable information, optimization of processes, and value creation through data-driven solutions. Looking to grow in junior roles in Business Intelligence, Data Analytics, or Data Science with a business focus.

experience.title: Business Intelligence Intern
items: Development of dashboards in Looker Studio to monitor commercial KPIs and support decision-making across commercial and growth teams.
Construction and maintenance of data pipelines using Google Cloud Platform (BigQuery, SQL, Python), improving data availability and reliability.
Optimization of queries in BigQuery, reducing processing times and improving report efficiency.
Analysis of commercial and operational data to identify trends and actionable insights for the business.
Collaboration with stakeholders to translate business requirements into data solutions and communicate findings clearly.

experience.title: Technology Instructor – Tecnolochicas Program
items: Instruction of web development, robotics, mobile app development, and artificial intelligence classes to middle and high school students.
Promotion of gender equity in technology, impacting more than 250 students in one year.

experience.title: President of the Software Engineering Student Group
items: Leadership of a student group focused on the academic, professional, and social development of Software Engineering students.
Coordination of academic events, conferences, workshops, and tech fairs.

programming.title: Tech Stack
programming.description: Languages and technologies applied to data analysis and development.

courses: Intro to Robotics — Aug 2024 (Fundación Televisa / Microsoft)
Intro to AI — Jun 2024 (Fundación Televisa / Microsoft)
HTML and CSS for Beginners — Dec 2023 (Fundación Televisa / Microsoft)
Frontend by Tecnolochicas Pro — Dec 2023 (Fundación Televisa / Microsoft)

education.faculty: Facultad de Ingeniería Mecánica y Eléctrica

contact.text: I am open to collaborating on technology projects, impact-driven initiatives, and professional opportunities where I can contribute through development, teaching, and leadership.
